The Rowe Collection LLC ii
Google for Startups
Backed by Google
Brilliance has been selected for the Google for Startups Cloud Program.
Google for Startups Cloud Program

Brilliance has been accepted into the Google for Startups Cloud Program, a highly selective initiative that provides promising startups with cloud credits, technical support, and access to Google's infrastructure and expertise. The program is designed to help early-stage companies scale their technology with enterprise-grade cloud resources.

Acceptance into the program is not open-application. Google identifies and selects companies that demonstrate meaningful technical innovation, clear product-market fit, and the potential to scale. Brilliance was selected on the strength of its AI-powered brand intelligence platform and its unique approach to consolidating brand operations, content strategy, and life management into a single, self-contained application.

What This Means
Cloud Infrastructure
Google Cloud credits to power Brilliance infrastructure, enabling faster scaling and reduced operational costs as the platform grows.
Technical Expertise
Access to Google engineers and technical advisors who provide guidance on architecture, scaling, and best practices for cloud-native applications.
Validation
Selection by Google serves as third-party validation of Brilliance's technical approach and market potential. The program accepts a limited number of startups from a large pool of candidates.
Network Access
Connection to Google's startup ecosystem, including other program participants, mentors, venture partners, and go-to-market resources.
Why Brilliance Was Selected

Google's selection criteria emphasize technical differentiation and scalable architecture. Brilliance stands out for several reasons:

  • Intelligent auto-routing across AI providers - Brilliance classifies every interaction and automatically routes to the optimal model across Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google Gemini. Strategy goes to Claude Opus, web research to GPT-5.4, creative work alternates between Gemini and Sonnet. No other platform dynamically selects the best AI for each task.
  • Five specialized AI agents per brand - Each brand in a portfolio gets its own team of AI agents (Strategy, Marketing, Operations, Documents, Intelligence) that are deeply calibrated to that brand's identity, voice, audience, and constraints. Over 200 operations span every business function.
  • Autonomous automation engine - Scheduled tasks, multi-step pipelines, and workflow presets run 24/7 without user intervention. A pipeline can generate content, create images, post to social media, send emails, and store results in the library in a single automated chain.
  • Multi-brand portfolio management - A single installation manages an entire portfolio of brands with instant switching, per-brand identity configuration, independent social connections, and separated AI contexts. No context bleed between brands.
  • Dual-mode platform - The combination of BrandAI (business intelligence) and LifeAI (personal management) in a single platform is architecturally novel. Business decisions informed by personal context, life planning informed by brand performance.
  • Integrated social and email publishing - Direct OAuth connections to X, Threads, Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok with per-brand social accounts. Gmail and Outlook integration with branded templates. AI-generated content flows directly to publication without leaving the platform.
The Rowe Collection LLC
Chapter I
Brand Essence
The foundation of what Brilliance is and why it exists.
What is Brilliance

Brilliance is a private, AI-powered operating system built for brand operators and individuals who demand full control over their intelligence infrastructure. It is not a SaaS product. It is not a chatbot wrapper. It is a comprehensive platform that consolidates brand strategy, marketing, operations, content, and personal life management into a single, self-contained application.

Designed and built by The Rowe Collection LLC in Austin, Texas, Brilliance operates as a single-experience application with zero external dependencies. All data lives in the user's browser via localStorage, with optional Firebase synchronization for cross-device access. Users provide their own API keys - there is no middleman, no data harvesting, no subscription wall for core functionality.

Two Modes of Intelligence

BrandAI Mode

Purpose-built for brand operators managing one or more brands. BrandAI deploys five specialized AI agents - Strategy, Marketing, Operations, Documents, and Intelligence - each calibrated to the user's brand identity, voice, audience, and goals. Over 200 operations span content creation, competitive analysis, financial planning, and more.

LifeAI Mode

A personal intelligence layer for the individual behind the brand. LifeAI provides five coaching archetypes - Life Coach, Wellness Coach, Tax Copilot, Personal AI, and Standard AI - each informed by the user's personal context including goals, health data, family details, career trajectory, and financial situation.

Core Philosophy

"Quiet competence" - professional elegance with intentional restraint. Every pixel, every interaction, every output reflects operational precision without ostentation.

Data Sovereignty

Your data. Your keys. Your intelligence. Brilliance never routes data through proprietary servers. API calls go directly from the browser to Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google. There is no analytics tracking, no telemetry, no usage reporting. The application is fully functional offline with cached data, and all synchronization is opt-in.

The Rowe Collection LLC 1
Chapter II
Voice & Tone
How Brilliance communicates across every touchpoint.
Brand Voice

Confident yet approachable. Luxurious without being ostentatious. Brilliance speaks with the quiet authority of a system that simply works - no hype, no exclamation points, no breathless feature announcements. The voice is that of a trusted advisor who respects the operator's intelligence.

Tone Principles
Principle Description Example
Quiet Competence Let the work speak. Avoid superlatives and marketing fluff. "Your brand strategy has been updated." not "Amazing update complete!"
Operational Precision Be specific. Use concrete terms over vague promises. "200+ operations" not "tons of AI features"
Brand Protection Every output respects the user's brand constraints and voice. AI outputs conform to brand-defined tone, audience, and vocabulary.
Consistency Same voice across all agents, views, and interactions. Whether in Chat, Studio, or Pulse - the tone never breaks character.
Voice Attributes
  • Direct and efficient - no filler words or unnecessary preamble
  • Technically precise - uses correct terminology without jargon overload
  • Respectfully minimal - says what needs to be said, nothing more
  • Warm but professional - approachable without being casual
  • Never uses emoji in system-generated content - SVG icons or text only
  • Avoids em-dashes - uses alternative punctuation or restructures
The Rowe Collection LLC 2
Chapter III
Target Audience
Who Brilliance serves and how they operate.
BrandAI Mode

Demographics

  • Brand operators and founders managing 1-5 brands
  • Solo entrepreneurs and small business owners
  • Creative directors and marketing professionals
  • Luxury and premium brand managers
  • Service-based business operators (consulting, coaching, concierge)
  • Content creators who treat their personal brand as a business

Psychographics

  • Values data ownership and privacy over convenience
  • Prefers tools that adapt to them, not the reverse
  • Appreciates design quality and aesthetic coherence
  • Operates across multiple business verticals simultaneously
  • Skeptical of SaaS subscription models and vendor lock-in
  • Technically literate enough to manage API keys and browser storage
LifeAI Mode

Target Users

  • Individuals seeking structured personal development support
  • Professionals managing complex personal and financial situations
  • People who want AI coaching without surrendering personal data to third parties
  • Those managing health, wellness, tax planning, and life goals holistically
  • Users who value continuity - the AI remembers context across conversations
The Rowe Collection LLC 3
Chapter IV
Competitive Advantages
What makes Brilliance fundamentally different.
Data Sovereignty
Unlike SaaS platforms that store your data on their servers, Brilliance keeps everything in your browser. API calls go directly to providers. There is no intermediary, no data mining, no usage analytics. You own every byte of your data, always.
Multi-Brand Portfolio Management
Most AI tools serve a single context. Brilliance supports an entire portfolio of brands with instant switching, per-brand identity configuration, independent social connections, and separated data stores. One platform, every brand, zero context bleed.
Cross-Mode Intelligence
The intersection of brand and personal intelligence is unique to Brilliance. Business decisions informed by personal context. Life planning informed by business performance. This dual-mode architecture creates a holistic intelligence layer that no single-purpose tool can replicate.
Zero Vendor Lock-in
Brilliance supports Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google AI providers simultaneously. Switch models mid-conversation. Use Claude for strategy and GPT for web research in the same workflow. Your data is in localStorage - export it, back it up, or move it at any time.
No Subscription for Core Features
The full AI platform - all 200+ operations, all agents, all views - works with just your own API keys. No monthly fee to access the intelligence layer. Subscriptions unlock enhanced features like cloud sync and social connections, but the core product is accessible to use.
Single-Experience Architecture
No build tools. No dependency management. No version conflicts. No CI/CD pipeline failures. One HTML file contains the entire platform. This is not a limitation - it is an architectural decision that eliminates entire categories of operational complexity.
The Rowe Collection LLC 4
Chapter V
Key Messaging
The core messages that define the Brilliance value proposition.
Master Messages

"Brilliance — the operating intelligence for brand & life."

"Your data. Your keys. Your intelligence."

"One system. Every brand. Total control."

BrandAI Value Propositions
  • Five specialized AI agents, each trained on your brand identity and voice
  • Over 200 operations spanning strategy, marketing, content, finance, and competitive analysis
  • Intelligence agent with live web search powered by GPT-5.4, plus 13 dedicated research operations
  • Multi-brand portfolio management with instant brand switching
  • Deep brand identity configuration that improves every AI output
  • Automated workflows with scheduled execution and pipeline chaining
  • Direct social media posting to X, Threads, Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok
  • Deep Google ecosystem integration: Google Calendar, Google Drive, Gmail, and Gemini AI models
  • Apple ecosystem support: iCloud Calendar, iCloud Mail via CalDAV
  • No subscription required for core AI features - bring your own API keys
LifeAI Value Propositions
  • Personal AI coaching that remembers your goals, health, finances, and family context
  • Five coaching archetypes from life planning to tax strategy
  • Complete data sovereignty - your personal information never leaves your browser
  • Cross-mode intelligence sharing between your brand and personal contexts
  • Wellness tracking, daily planning, and structured personal development
The Rowe Collection LLC 5
Chapter VI
Platform Features
A comprehensive overview of every Brilliance capability.
Core Views
Chat
Multi-agent conversations with file attachments, multimodal content support (images, documents), and real-time streaming responses. Switch between agents mid-conversation. Full conversation history with search.
Folio
Visual creation engine and living canvas. AI-powered image and visual generation with gallery management, version tracking, pinning, comments, and full-screen editing. Save visuals from Chat, Studio, Bloom, and Automations into a unified visual workspace.
Pulse
Unified command center combining goals, calendar, daily planning, task management, completion streaks, and integrated automation overview. The single view for everything happening today and everything planned ahead.
Studio
Over 200 AI operations with a custom operation builder. Organized by category - content, strategy, marketing, finance, analysis, and more. Output canvas with table of contents for multi-result sessions.
Rhythm
Multi-platform calendar with Google Calendar, Outlook, and iCloud integration. Color-coded event sources, calendar visibility toggles, and write-back support for creating events directly on connected platforms.
Automations
Automations Lab for scheduled tasks, multi-step pipelines, workflow presets, and execution history. Set recurring AI operations, content generation, email campaigns, and social posting on autopilot.
Universal Search
Cmd+K spotlight with three modes: AI (brand-aware answers), Navigate (fuzzy match to any view), and Actions (command patterns). Also accessible as a rich side panel with AI results and notification center.
Reminders
Scheduled reminders with push notifications, in-app popups, and smart actions (Talk to AI, Add to Pulse, Snooze). Bottom-right popup stack with Web Push infrastructure for cross-device alerts.
The Rowe Collection LLC 6
New Surfaces — v33 Welcome Release
Brilli — the entity
Canvas 2D ambient presence on the chat hero with attending / thinking / pleased / asleep / delivering states. Five selectable forms: Celestial Orb (default), Aura/Field, Firefly, Light Signature, plus the original Classic BLAKE blob if preferred. Intensity slider modulates glow, pulse rate, sparks, and breathing scale.
Concierge Desk
A "what's active today" pill row above the chat input. Surfaces Pulse goals, today's calendar, automations, Bloom queue, Evolve countdown, streaks, and a Resume-last-conversation pill. One tap into any of them.
Focus Mode
A universal modifier (⌘⇧F or Ctrl+Shift+F) that strips ambient chrome from any surface, leaving only the active content + Brilli + input. Esc exits. Disable in Settings if accidentally triggered. A pulsing gold corner dot indicates the mode is on.
History · Time Ribbon
A horizontal scrubbing timeline of past conversations. Each marker is a moment — gold for BrandAI, blue for LifeAI — positioned proportionally by timestamp. Click a marker to Resume or Branch from here. Range Summary placeholder for v34.
Studio · Split-Pane Workspace
Run a Studio operation with input on the left and live artifact streaming on the right. Sticky output pane, gold-gradient divider thread between panes. Reversible — falls back to single-column flow under 1100px viewports.
Folio · Studio at Work
Treats the active artifact as the centerpiece — chat moves to a narrow 280-360px right gutter. Existing pipeline logic stays; only the visualization changes. Reversible toggle in the Folio tab bar.
Notebook · Letter Series
Cream paper background, Cormorant Garamond serif title, narrow 720–760px center column, gold drop cap on the first paragraph. Marginalia float for elements with .letter-margin. Reversible — data unchanged, only visual treatment.
Thought Board
A new free-form research surface. Pin moments from Chat, Notebook, or Studio with one click. Two views: Pinboard grid (active manipulation) + Constellation 2D map (navigation). Sidebar shows a live pin count.
Evolve · Educational Intelligence
Five-tab learning surface: Today (Pulse Dashboard + Liquid Rhythm), Practice (adaptive multi-model quiz), Translator (concepts mapped through your existing mental models), Verify (peer-review with VERIFIED / CORRECTED / INSUFFICIENT), Skills (library of skills, sources, reflections, brand SOPs).
Sync Reconcile + UUID Purge
Admin tooling in the Synchronization Hub: Preview drift (per-category local vs cloud diff), Reconcile tombstones (deletes cloud items matching local tombstones to resolve perpetual "Aligning..." states), and Purge stale UUID data (two-step confirm, irreversible — for old-version cleanup before v5 sync activation).
The Rowe Collection LLC 6.5
Knowledge & Context
Identity
Deep brand configuration covering essence, voice, audience, messaging, products, constraints, and knowledge documents. LifeAI identity includes about me, goals, health, family, career, and finances. The depth of configuration directly correlates with output quality.
History
Browse, search, and revisit past AI conversations across all agents. Full conversation archive with filtering by agent, date, and content. Context preservation ensures continuity across sessions.
Bloom
Daily content feed with curated insights and brand-relevant articles. AI-powered content discovery tailored to your brand's industry, audience, and strategic goals.
Library
Document storage and knowledge base with Google Drive integration. Upload reference documents, style guides, and strategic plans. Content is injected into AI context for informed outputs across all agents and operations.
Guardrails
Content safety and output preferences. Define constraints, tone boundaries, and content policies that govern all AI outputs. Ensures every response respects your brand's standards and communication guidelines.
Communication & Outreach
Social
Multi-platform posting to X, Threads, Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok. OAuth connections per brand, scheduled posts, and AI-generated content. Direct API integration with no third-party scheduling tools required.
Mail
Email composer with branded templates, Gmail, Outlook, and iCloud Mail integration, outbox queue, signature management, and AI writing tools. Batch pipeline support for automated email campaigns.
Push Notifications
Real-time notification center for automation completions, scheduled task results, system alerts, and important updates. Badge indicators and grouped notification history with direct navigation to results.
Feedback
In-app feedback system with categorized submissions for bugs, features, UI/UX, and general input. Area-specific tagging, screenshot support, and admin review dashboard with bulk status management and export.
The Rowe Collection LLC 7
Business Operations
Analytics
Revenue tracking, performance metrics, and business intelligence dashboards. Monitor key indicators across all brands in your portfolio with visual trend analysis.
Inventory
Product and service catalog management. Track items, pricing, availability, and categorization. Integrates with brand identity for consistent product presentation.
People
Team members, direct reports, and contact management with custom analytics and KPIs. Track relationships, assign roles, monitor performance metrics, and get AI-informed communication suggestions based on brand voice.
Admin
Access key management, user tier administration, and brand configuration sharing. Generate and distribute access keys, manage subscription tiers, and monitor platform usage.
The Rowe Collection LLC 8
Integrations

Brilliance connects directly to the platforms you already use. All integrations are per-brand, meaning each brand in your portfolio can have its own connected accounts with zero overlap.

Category Platform Capability
AI Providers Anthropic (Claude) Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5 - strategy, reasoning, documents
OpenAI (GPT) GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 Pro - web search, intelligence, research
Google (Gemini) Gemini 3.1 Pro, 3.0 Flash - creative, multimodal, speed
Calendar Google Calendar Read, write, and sync events with color-coded sources
Microsoft Outlook Full calendar read/write via Microsoft Graph API
iCloud Calendar CalDAV integration for Apple ecosystem calendar sync
Email Gmail Send, receive, branded templates, batch campaigns
Microsoft Outlook Full email integration via Microsoft Graph
iCloud Mail Apple ecosystem email support
Storage Google Drive Document import and knowledge base integration
Social Media X (Twitter) OAuth posting, per-brand accounts, media attachments
Instagram Direct posting via Meta Graph API
Threads Text and media posting via Meta API
LinkedIn Profile and company page posting
TikTok Video and content publishing
Media Generation Google Imagen AI image generation from text prompts
Google Veo AI video generation from text prompts
Infrastructure Firebase Real-time sync, authentication, Firestore, Cloud Functions scheduler
The Rowe Collection LLC 9
Chapter VII
AI Agents
Specialized intelligence, calibrated to your context.
BrandAI Agents
Agent Description
Strategy High-level brand positioning, competitive analysis, market strategy, and growth planning. The strategic mind of your brand.
Marketing Campaign development, content creation, audience targeting, and messaging. Generates brand-voice-aligned marketing assets.
Operations Process optimization, financial analysis, operational planning, and workflow efficiency. The practical backbone of brand management.
Documents Long-form content, technical writing, documentation, and structured output. Produces polished, brand-consistent documents.
Intelligence Real-time web search, trend analysis, competitive monitoring, and research synthesis. Powered by GPT-5.4 with live web search capability. 13 specialized operations for market intelligence.
LifeAI Coaches
Coach Description
Personal AI General-purpose personal assistant with full context of your life profile. Handles any personal query with awareness of your complete situation.
Life Coach Goal setting, personal development planning, habit tracking, and accountability. Informed by your stated life goals, values, and priorities.
Wellness Coach Health and wellness guidance based on your health profile, fitness goals, and lifestyle preferences. Holistic approach to physical and mental wellbeing.
Tax Copilot Tax planning and financial strategy based on your income, deductions, business structure, and financial goals. Year-round tax optimization, not just filing season.
Standard AI Unrestricted general intelligence without life-profile injection. Clean AI interaction for tasks that do not require personal context.
B.L.A.K.E. - Brand Life AI Knowledge Engine

B.L.A.K.E. is the overarching adaptive intelligence that unifies BrandAI and LifeAI into a single, coherent entity. It is not just an assistant or a chatbot wrapper. BLAKE is an AI entity that learns, adapts, and embodies who you are across both your professional and personal worlds.

BLAKE represents the convergence of brand intelligence and life intelligence. When you configure your brand identity, voice, audience, and goals, BLAKE absorbs that context and applies it across every agent, every operation, and every automated workflow. The same is true for your personal profile - goals, health, finances, and daily rhythms all feed into BLAKE's understanding of you.

Visual Identity

BLAKE has a customizable visual presence within the platform. Users choose between two ambient AI visualization modes:

  • Blob - A fluid, organic WebGL shape that responds to AI state (idle, thinking, responding). Multiple shape presets (Crystal, Sphere, Flow) with user-defined color palettes.
  • Helix - A full-viewport flowing ribbon gradient that creates an ambient, living workspace. Smooth movement with customizable color themes.

Both modes react to BLAKE's activity state, creating a visual connection between the user and their AI. Colors, shapes, and intensity are fully customizable per brand, meaning each brand in a portfolio can have its own distinct BLAKE appearance.

Key Capabilities

Adaptive Context
BLAKE maintains deep context across conversations, brand switches, and mode transitions. It remembers what was discussed, what was decided, and what was planned.
Multi-Provider Intelligence
BLAKE routes tasks to the optimal AI model automatically. Claude for strategy, GPT for web research, Gemini for creative work. The user interacts with one entity; BLAKE selects the best brain for each task.
Brand Embodiment
Every output BLAKE produces is filtered through the active brand's identity - voice, tone, audience, constraints, and visual language. BLAKE does not generate generic content; it generates your brand's content.
Autonomous Execution
Through the Automations Lab, BLAKE operates independently on scheduled tasks and multi-step pipelines. Content creation, social posting, email campaigns, and research run without human intervention.

Learn more at roweos.com/blake

Cross-Mode Intelligence

BrandAI and LifeAI are not isolated silos. When the user operates in BrandAI mode, BLAKE can reference personal context (schedule, energy levels, priorities) to inform business decisions. In LifeAI mode, brand performance data can surface to provide work-life balance insights. This cross-pollination is controlled by the user and never automatic - data sharing between modes is always explicit and intentional.

The Rowe Collection LLC 9
Chapter VIII
Adaptive Operations Engine
How Brilliance transforms identity into intelligence.
Dynamic Pipeline

Every AI operation in Brilliance follows a consistent pipeline that injects brand context at every stage. This is not prompt engineering - it is systematic identity integration that makes every output inherently on-brand.

Select Operation
Load Brand Identity
Assign Agent
Inject Context
Execute
Output Canvas
Custom Operation Builder

Users can create custom operations with defined prompts, agent assignments, and category placement. Custom operations integrate seamlessly with the existing operation library and support all pipeline features including scheduled execution and workflow chaining.

Identity Depth and Output Quality
Identity Level Configuration Output Quality
Minimal Brand name only Generic AI output with brand name inserted
Basic Name, industry, audience Industry-appropriate content with audience awareness
Configured Voice, tone, products, competitors On-brand content that reflects genuine brand personality
Deep Full identity with knowledge docs and constraints Output indistinguishable from internal brand team production
BrandAI Operations Categories
Category Examples
Content Creation Blog posts, social captions, email copy, video scripts
Strategy Brand audit, competitive analysis, market positioning, SWOT
Marketing Campaign briefs, ad copy, audience personas, launch plans
Finance Revenue projections, pricing strategy, budget allocation
Operations Process documentation, SOP creation, workflow optimization
Intelligence Web research, trend analysis, competitor monitoring, market signals
Documents Proposals, reports, presentations, contracts, briefs
Image & Video AI image generation, video creation via Veo, visual content
Workflow Presets & Pipelines

Brilliance supports multi-step automation chains called pipelines. A pipeline can combine Studio operations, social media posts, image generation, video creation, library storage, email dispatch, and notification steps into a single automated workflow. Predefined workflow presets provide starting templates, and custom pipelines can be saved and scheduled for recurring execution.

Template variables allow output from one step to feed into the next using {{stepN_output}} syntax, enabling sophisticated content production chains - for example, generating a blog post, creating a social summary, producing a header image, and posting to multiple platforms in a single execution.

The Rowe Collection LLC 10
Chapter IX
Access & Tiers
Tiers, access control, and distribution.
Tier System
Tier Access Level Key Features
Founder (Beta) Full platform - currently free All views, all agents, brand config sharing, automations, social connections, analytics, full identity depth, Firebase sync
Basic Enhanced features Firebase sync, data export, cross-device access
Premium Enterprise capabilities White-label potential, multi-user support, private onboarding, priority infrastructure

During the beta period, all users receive Founder-tier access at no cost. Paid tiers will be introduced in a future release.

Access Key Distribution

Platform access is managed through cryptographic access keys generated by the admin. Each key is tier-specific, can include optional notes, and tracks activation status. Users validate and link keys through the Settings view. Keys are stored in Firestore and associated with the user's Firebase UID upon activation.

Brand Config Sharing

Any signed-in user can share their current brand configuration via a share code or join link. The recipient receives a complete snapshot of the brand identity - name, colors, voice, audience, products, and custom operations. Join links use the ?join=CODE URL parameter and are processed synchronously before routing to prevent race conditions with onboarding flows.

Administrators can generate comprehensive brand configs that include settings, memory, and cross-brand data for team distribution.

White-Label Potential

The architecture supports white-label deployment where the entire Brilliance experience can be rebranded for enterprise clients. Per-brand accent colors, custom logos, and configurable identity fields make each deployment visually and contextually unique while sharing the same underlying platform.

The Rowe Collection LLC 11
Chapter X
Install as Web App
Download Brilliance as a native-feeling application on any device.
Progressive Web App

Brilliance is a fully installable Progressive Web App (PWA). Once installed, it runs in its own window with no browser chrome - just like a native application. It supports offline access, push notifications, and automatic updates. Your data persists locally between sessions.

iPhone / iPad (Safari)

  1. Open roweos.com in Safari
  2. Tap the Share button (square with arrow) at the bottom of the screen
  3. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
  4. Tap "Add" in the top right corner
  5. Brilliance will appear as an app icon on your home screen

Mac / Windows / Linux (Chrome or Edge)

  1. Open roweos.com in Chrome or Edge
  2. Click the install icon in the address bar (monitor with down arrow), or open the browser menu
  3. Select "Install Brilliance" or "Install app"
  4. Click "Install" in the confirmation dialog
  5. Brilliance opens in its own window and appears in your Applications or Start Menu
What Changes After Install
  • Runs in a standalone window without browser navigation bars
  • Launches from your home screen or app dock like a native application
  • Works offline with cached data and previously loaded content
  • Receives background updates automatically when connected
  • All localStorage data persists between sessions
  • Firebase sync keeps data consistent across all your installed devices
The Rowe Collection LLC 12
Chapter XI
Visual Identity & Design Language
The aesthetic system that defines every Brilliance surface.
Design Foundation

Brilliance employs a dark-theme-first design language built on #0a0a0a backgrounds with glass morphism effects (backdrop-filter: blur(20px)). The primary accent color is gold (#a89878), which can be overridden per brand through the CSS custom property system. Every UI element - from buttons to borders to hover states - derives its color from these properties, ensuring complete visual consistency when switching between brands.

Color System
Property Value Usage
--brand-accent #a89878 (default gold) Primary accent, buttons, active states
--brand-accent-rgb 168, 152, 120 Used with rgba() for transparency variants
--brand-accent-10 to -70 10% to 70% opacity variants Backgrounds, borders, hover states
Agent colors Strategy #a78bfa, Marketing #f472b6, Ops #4ade80, Docs #fbbf24, Intel #22d3ee Agent indicators, chat bubbles, operation badges
Iconography

Brilliance uses inline SVG icons exclusively. No emoji characters appear anywhere in the interface. Icons follow a consistent specification: viewBox="0 0 24 24", stroke-width: 1.5 or 2, with sizes of 14px (small), 16px (default), and 20px (large). All icons use currentColor for stroke, inheriting from their parent element's text color.

Per-Brand Customization

Each brand in a user's portfolio can define its own accent color, which propagates through every CSS custom property in real time. The function applyBrandAccentColor(color) sets both the --brand-accent-* and --accent-* families, ensuring complete visual transformation when switching brands. Light mode is supported via the html.light-mode class, with separate brand color definitions for light backgrounds.

Typography

The system font stack prioritizes SF Pro for maximum rendering quality, falling back through Helvetica Neue and system defaults. Font weights are deliberately restrained - primarily 300 (light) for headings and 400 (regular) for body text, with 500 and 600 reserved for emphasis and labels.

Ambient AI Visualization

Brilliance features WebGL-powered ambient backgrounds that respond to AI state. Users choose between two visualization modes during onboarding:

  • Blob - A fluid, organic WebGL shape centered in the chat view. Customizable colors, multiple shape presets, and state-reactive animation (idle, thinking, responding)
  • Helix - A full-viewport flowing ribbon gradient that spans edge-to-edge. Smooth, ambient movement with customizable color palettes

Both modes support light and dark themes with reduced opacity for readability, custom color selection, and a Reduce Transparency toggle for users who prefer a cleaner workspace.

The Rowe Collection LLC 13
Chapter XII
Technical Architecture
A single experience. Zero dependencies. Maximum capability.
Single-Experience Architecture

Brilliance is a single HTML file exceeding 200,000 lines, built from a modular source architecture of 25+ files concatenated into a single deployable HTML file. No build tools, no bundler, no framework beyond a simple concatenation script. The only CDN dependencies are Firebase SDK (for optional sync) and Marked.js (for Markdown rendering). This architecture was a deliberate choice - it eliminates dependency management, build failures, and version conflicts. The entire application can be opened from a local file system.

Browser APIs
API Usage
localStorage Primary data storage for all user data, brand configs, conversation history, and settings
IndexedDB Hints for large data storage optimization
Service Worker PWA support, offline caching, background sync
Web App Manifest Mobile install, app-like experience, splash screen
Fetch API Direct API calls to AI providers and social platforms
WebGL Ambient AI visualizations (Blob and Helix background animations)
Write-Through Sync Architecture

Brilliance v25.0 introduced a write-through synchronization architecture where every data mutation is immediately written to both localStorage and Firestore simultaneously. Cloud data is authoritative. Real-time Firestore listeners keep all connected devices in sync with zero manual intervention. A pending writes queue handles offline scenarios, automatically flushing when connectivity returns. Conflict resolution uses timestamp-based merging to ensure data integrity across concurrent sessions.

Brilliance AI - Intelligent Auto-Routing

Brilliance AI is an intelligent routing layer that automatically selects the best model for each task. It classifies interactions into categories (creative, strategic, code, multimodal, quick, general) and routes to the optimal provider based on each model's strengths. Users supply their own API keys with no proxy, no middleman, and no usage tracking. All calls go directly from the browser to the provider.

Task Type Primary Model Why
Strategic / Analysis Claude Opus 4.7 Deepest reasoning, nuanced business strategy, competitive analysis
Creative Writing Gemini 3.1 Pro / Sonnet 4.6 Alternates between providers for varied, high-quality creative output
Code / Technical Claude Sonnet 4.6 Best-in-class code generation, debugging, and technical writing
Multimodal (Images) Gemini 3.1 Pro Native multimodal understanding for image analysis and context
Quick Response Gemini 3.0 Flash Fastest response time for short, simple queries
Intelligence (Web Search) GPT-5.4 Live web search capability for real-time research and market data
General Sonnet 4.6 / Gemini 3.1 Pro Round-robin alternation for balanced, high-quality responses
Supported Models

Users can also manually select any model. Brilliance supports the full range across all three providers plus dedicated media generation models.

Provider Models Strengths
Anthropic Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5 Strategy, reasoning, code, long-form documents
OpenAI GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 Pro, GPT-5.4 Thinking Web search, intelligence ops, research synthesis
Google Gemini 3.1 Pro, Gemini 3.0 Flash Multimodal, creative, speed (Flash)
Image Generation Nano Banana Pro 3, Nano Banana 3.0 AI image generation via Google's image models
Video Generation Veo 3.1, Veo 3.1 Fast, Veo 3, Veo 2 Text-to-video generation via Google Veo
Serverless Infrastructure

Vercel serverless functions handle capabilities that require server-side execution: Cloud Scheduler for automated task execution, social media OAuth token exchange, email dispatch, CalDAV calendar proxying, and Stripe webhook processing. The scheduler runs every minute via Vercel Cron, checking for due tasks and executing them with full brand context.

The Rowe Collection LLC 14

The Rowe Collection LLC - Austin, Texas
